mnemonics: C.I.E. is an Ongoing C.A.R.E. Process: Continuous Assessment & Review for Ethics
keyPoints: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) ensures AI systems are monitored and assessed for ethical compliance throughout their lifecycle, not just at launch.
It involves iterative processes like regular audits, impact assessments, and feedback loops to identify and mitigate biases, risks, and unintended consequences.
CIE is a core component of responsible AI governance, promoting transparency, accountability, and public trust in automated systems.
commonMistakes: Assuming ethical compliance is a one-time task achieved during the initial design and development phase.
Focusing solely on technical performance metrics (e.g., accuracy, speed) while neglecting ongoing societal impact and ethical implications.
